user.title: Add Raylogic MOD4U
user.description: Device ka IP address daalo. Har channel ka type wahi chuno jo aapne Raylogic GO app mein (Select Type screen) set kiya hai - device khud apna type nahi batata. Area wahi daalo jo Mod Settings screen mein dikhta hai (e.g. 12 ya 16). Area = 0 sirf tab chalega jab sabhi 4 channel 'relay' hon (HA khud seekh lega app/switch se ek baar toggle karke) - Dimmer/Fan/Curtain/CTC ke liye Area zaroor manually dena hoga. MOD4U ke 4 channels 2 PAIRS mein hote hain: Pair 1 = Channel 1+2, Pair 2 = Channel 3+4. CTC (colour-temperature light) aur Curtain DONO apni pair ke dono physical channels internally use karte hain - agar Channel 1 Type = 'ctc' ya 'curtain' chuno to Channel 2 Type field automatically ignore ho jaata hai (ek hi entity banti hai), aur waisa hi Channel 3/4 ke liye. CTC choose karne par uska Driver Mode bhi batao - 'single' (app mein 'Single Driver' checked) ya 'double'.

data.channel_start: First Channel Number (usually 1, but check Raylogic GO app if channels aren't 1-4)
data.channel_1_ctc_mode: Channel 1 CTC Driver Mode (only if Channel 1 Type = ctc)
data.channel_2_ctc_mode: Channel 2 CTC Driver Mode (only if Channel 2 Type = ctc)
data.channel_3_ctc_mode: Channel 3 CTC Driver Mode (only if Channel 3 Type = ctc)
data.channel_4_ctc_mode: Channel 4 CTC Driver Mode (only if Channel 4 Type = ctc)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check IP address and ensure device is powered on.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.
error.area_required_for_non_relay: Dimmer/Fan/Curtain/CTC channels ke liye Area (0 nahi) manually dena zaroori hai - auto-learn sirf Relay ke liye kaam karta hai.

abort.already_configured: This Raylogic MOD4U device is already configured.

init.title: Configure Raylogic MOD4U
init.description: Channel type (relay/dimmer/fan/curtain/ctc), Area, ya channel numbering yahan se badlo - device delete karne ki zaroorat nahi. Yaad rakho: Pair 1 = Channel 1+2, Pair 2 = Channel 3+4 - Curtain/CTC ek pair ka dono channel consume karte hain.

error.area_required_for_non_relay: Dimmer/Fan/Curtain/CTC ke liye Area manually dena zaroori hai (0 sirf Relay LEARN mode ke liye chalta hai).
